preserved_files.description: Main repository README. Contains project overview, tech stack description, audit status, and comprehensive feature list. Primary entry point for developers and stakeholders understanding the restaurant template system.
preserved_files.use_when: Onboarding new developers or providing project overview

preserved_files.description: Complete commercial plan documentation. Defines Essential vs Professional tier features, pricing strategy (R$150-350/month), monetization model, and business positioning for SaaS restaurant template sales.
preserved_files.use_when: Pricing discussions, sales presentations, or defining client packages

preserved_files.description: Latest audit summary and improvement roadmap (v3.0 as of Feb 13, 2026). Tracks Phase 1 completion status, security scores (8/10), and prioritized next steps for achieving 9/10+ ratings across all metrics.
preserved_files.use_when: Checking current project status or planning next development phase

preserved_files.description: Per-client configuration template. Comprehensive checklist for gathering client data (restaurant name, branding, WhatsApp, Stripe keys, domain) before deployment. Essential for consistent client onboarding.
preserved_files.use_when: Starting new client project or preparing deployment variables

preserved_files.description: End-to-end deployment guide (1088 lines). Step-by-step instructions from local testing through production deployment on Render/Railway, including PostgreSQL setup, environment variables, Prisma migrations, and troubleshooting.
preserved_files.use_when: Deploying to production or solving deployment issues

preserved_files.description: Sales and customization playbook for selling restaurant templates. Covers client discovery, demo preparation, objection handling, pricing negotiation, and common customization requests with implementation estimates.
preserved_files.use_when: Preparing sales pitch or scoping custom work for clients

preserved_files.description: Ready-to-use sales message templates. Copy-paste WhatsApp/email scripts for prospecting, follow-ups, pricing discussions, objection responses, and closing. Optimized for restaurant owner communication style.
preserved_files.use_when: Reaching out to prospects or following up with leads

preserved_files.description: Condensed final audit verdict (Feb 12, 2026). Production readiness assessment covering security (7.5/10), technical quality (8.5/10), and identified issues (H-01 to L-06) with severity classifications.
preserved_files.use_when: Quick reference for audit results or security review

preserved_files.description: Phased correction roadmap (712 lines). Breaks down audit issues into actionable phases (Phase 0 blockers through Phase 3 polish), with specific code fixes, file references, and implementation priority for each item.
preserved_files.use_when: Planning technical debt reduction or implementing security fixes

preserved_files.description: Latest production readiness verdict (Feb 13, 2026). GO/NO-GO decision with mandatory checklist verification (.env not committed, JWT_SECRET validation, CSRF protection, rate limiting). Final confirmation: SAFE TO SELL with 8/10 security, 8/10 technical, 7/10 UX scores.
preserved_files.use_when: Final pre-sale verification or confirming production readiness
